title: Skills
description: Skills Mod adding skills to minecraft, like fishing and foraging.
body:
🛡️ **Skills Mod – Level Up Your Minecraft Experience!**

Bring MMO-like progression to your world with the Skills Mod!

Unlock new abilities, grow stronger over time, and customize your playstyle like never before.

🔥 **Features**:
-   Skill Progression System – Gain EXP in in selected stat by performing actions like mining, combat, farming, and more.
  
-   Unlock Powerful Abilities – Earn skills by leveling the stats up.
  
-   Customizable Growth – Focus on the skills you care about—become a master miner, a deadly warrior, or a farming legend.
  
-   Seamless Integration – Designed to feel natural in vanilla gameplay, without overwhelming the experience.
   
Whether you're playing solo or with friends, the Skills Mod adds long-term goals and satisfying progression that make every block you break and mob you fight feel rewarding.

📦**Installation**:
Just drop the mod into your mods folder like any other Forge mod and start leveling.
